ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the mutation in the genome */,
  "reference_base" TEXT /* Reference base at the mutation position */,
  "alternative_bases" TEXT /* Alternative bases observed at the mutation position */,
  "masking_recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for masking the mutation */,
  "exclusion_reasons" TEXT /* Reasons for excluding the mutation from analysis */,
  "source_country" TEXT /* Country where the mutation was discovered */,
  "source_lab" TEXT /* Laboratory where the mutation was discovered */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submitter who entered the mutation */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the mutation occurs */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species in which the mutation was discovered */,
  "date_discovered" TEXT /* Date when the mutation was first identified */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., SNP, insertion, deletion) */,
  "functional_impact_score" REAL /* Score indicating the potential functional impact of the mutation */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the mutation (e.g., benign, pathogenic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitters" (
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submitter */,
  "submitter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the submitter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the submitter */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the submitter belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the submitter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the submitter */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the submitter for unique identification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the laboratory is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the laboratory */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the laboratory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., clinical significance, functional impact) */,
  "annotation_details" TEXT /* Details of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_annotations_annotated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_annotations_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "publication_link" TEXT /* Link to the publication or study */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., study, project, database) */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was created or published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_sources_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the mutation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the mutation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the mutation record */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "previous_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous version of the mutation record */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_versions_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_versions_previous_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_version_id") REFERENCES mutation_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_versions_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., frequency, clinical impact) */,
  "statistic_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was calculated */,
  "statistic_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the statistic */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the statistic value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_statistics_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation discussed in the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_link" TEXT /* Link to the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_publications_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment, if the comment is a reply */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the comment is private (visible only to the user and admins) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_comments_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES mutation_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation */,
  "tag_text" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., functional, clinical, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_tags_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)
